suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton (CUST_0057), a high-risk customer, has been involved in large and frequent transactions across various channels, including mobile, electronic, ATM, and branch, from February to August 2025. The transactions, which include large account balances and high average monthly balances, are inconsistent with her profile and indicate potential money laundering activities.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: High-risk customer with large account balances and high average monthly balances. Transaction patterns include large and frequent transactions that are inconsistent with the stated purpose. These patterns are indicative of potential money laundering activities.
